props.text: Plans that scale with your roadmap.
Choose a tier, ship with confidence, and move up when your team needs more guardrails — core workflows stay predictable.
Best when you are proving product-market fit with a small crew and a tight scope.
The sweet spot for product teams sharing libraries, reviews, and release cadence.
For orgs that need enterprise controls, tighter SLAs, and a human on speed-dial.
